name: /standards-audit: --threshold 80 exits 1 when overall coverage percentage is below the threshold (CI gate)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: a
  name: A
  url: https://a.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: b
  name: B
  url: https://b.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit.md" --threshold 80
